{{Quote|We've had our losses lately. Terris and Naima|Amie Antin|<ref name="Secret weapon">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]''</ref>}}
'''Terris''' was a member of [[the Eleven]], a resistance group based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. Around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], while Terris and fellow resistance member [[Naima]] were [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-wing starfighters]], they encountered an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial starship (Bellassa)|starship]] above Bellassa. The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ordered the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to fire on them, and Terris and Naima were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Later, [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Amie Antin]] informed the resistance members [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]] of their deaths.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Lord Vader, we have starfighters on our radar not registered to the Bellassan government. Possible members of the resistance.|An Imperial captain, to Darth Vader|<ref name="Secret weapon" />}}
[[File:FerusOlin-LotJ4.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ferus Olin (pictured)  was a friend of Terris and witnessed their death.]]
Terris was a member of [[the Eleven]], a resistance group based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. They were a friend of the resistance member [[Ferus Olin]].<ref name="Secret weapon" /> Around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Terris and fellow resistance member [[Naima]] were [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-wing starfighters]] when they encountered an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial starship (Bellassa)|starship]] near Bellassa's inner [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Unidentified Imperial captain (Bellassa)|captain]] informed<ref name="Secret weapon" /> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]]<ref name="Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] that the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were on their [[Radar/Legends|radar]] and that they were not registered to Bellassa's government, indicating they could be members of the resistance. The [[Captain/Legends|captain]] then told Vader that the starfighters had not identified themselves, and Vader ordered them to blast the fighters. Although the captain protested, saying they were likely just doing surveillance, they eventually complied, destroying one of the fighters. As the second fighter attempted to avoid the Imperial starship, an [[Unidentified Imperial officer (Bellassa)|officer]] commented on the way it squirmed. The remaining V-wing was destroyed soon after.<ref name="Secret weapon" />

Olin, who was acting as a [[Spy/Legends|double-agent]] aboard the Imperial starship, felt helpless as he watched the fighters be destroyed and thought it was likely he either knew the pilots or their friends or family. Later, on Bellassa, [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Amie Antin]] told resistance members [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]] about the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of Terris and Naima. Lands was saddened by their deaths and hoped Olin had not known the starfighters were piloted by friends.<ref name="Secret weapon" />

==Personality and traits==
Ferus Olin believed that Terris was brave to attack an Imperial starship, although he was unaware of their identity.<ref name="Secret weapon" />

==Equipment==
Terris piloted a V-wing starfighter.<ref name="Secret weapon" />

==Behind the scenes==
Terris indirectly appeared in a starfighter in ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'', a [[2007]] junior novel written by [[Jude Watson]] as the seventh installment in the ''[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]]'' series.<ref name="Secret weapon" />

==Appearances==
